🏠 Home › Office/Azure/Exchange

Outlook Classic: Essential Keyboard Shortcuts

Office/Azure/Exchange
📅 January 21, 2026 ⏱️ 3 min read ✍️ Andy
#Outlook #Office365 #Keyboard Shortcuts #Productivity
## Most Frequently Used ### Navigation - **Ctrl + 1** - Go to Mail - **Ctrl + 2** - Go to Calendar - **Ctrl + 3** - Go to Contacts - **Ctrl + 4** - Go to Tasks - **Ctrl + Shift + I** - Go to Inbox ### Email - Create & Send - **Ctrl + N** - New email (context-sensitive: creates item based on current view) - **Ctrl + R** - Reply - **Ctrl + Shift + R** - Reply All - **Ctrl + F** - Forward - **Alt + S** or **Ctrl + Enter** - Send message ### Email - Manage - **Delete** - Delete item (moves to Deleted Items) - **Backspace** - Archive/Delete (depending on settings) - **Shift + Delete** - Permanently delete (bypass Deleted Items) - **Ctrl + Q** - Mark as read - **Ctrl + U** - Mark as unread - **Ctrl + Shift + V** - Move to folder - **Ctrl + Shift + G** - Flag for follow-up ### Email - Navigation - **↑/↓** - Move between messages - **Enter** - Open message - **Escape** - Close message - **Space** - Page down in Reading Pane - **Shift + Space** - Page up in Reading Pane ### Send/Receive - **F9** or **Ctrl + M** - Send/Receive all ### Search - **F3** or **Ctrl + E** - Search current view - **Ctrl + Shift + F** - Advanced Find ### Formatting (Compose Mode) - **Ctrl + B** - Bold - **Ctrl + I** - Italic - **Ctrl + U** - Underline - **Ctrl + K** - Insert hyperlink (in body) / Check names (in To/Cc/Bcc fields) - **F7** - Spell check --- ## Calendar Essentials - **Ctrl + 2** - Switch to Calendar - **Ctrl + N** - New appointment (when in Calendar view) - **Ctrl + Shift + Q** - New meeting request - **Ctrl + G** - Go to date - **Ctrl + Alt + 1** - Day view - **Ctrl + Alt + 2** - Work Week view - **Ctrl + Alt + 3** - Week view - **Ctrl + Alt + 4** - Month view --- ## Contacts & Tasks - **Ctrl + 3** - Switch to Contacts - **Ctrl + 4** - Switch to Tasks - **Ctrl + Shift + C** - New contact - **Ctrl + Shift + K** - New task --- ## Universal Actions - **Ctrl + P** - Print - **Ctrl + S** - Save draft - **Ctrl + Z** - Undo - **Ctrl + A** - Select all - **Ctrl + C/V/X** - Copy/Paste/Cut - **F1** - Help - **Alt + F4** - Close Outlook --- ## Pro Tips 1. **Ctrl + Shift + V** is your best friend for quick email organization 2. **F9** for instant send/receive when waiting for messages 3. **Backspace** provides quick archive/delete in inbox 4. **Ctrl + K** checks names AND inserts hyperlinks (context-sensitive) 5. **Ctrl + N** creates contextually: email in Mail, appointment in Calendar, contact in Contacts 6. Master **Ctrl + 1-4** to fly between Mail/Calendar/Contacts/Tasks --- **Quick Reference Card:** - Navigate: **Ctrl + 1-4** (Mail/Calendar/Contacts/Tasks) - Reply: **Ctrl + R** \| Reply All: **Ctrl + Shift + R** \| Forward: **Ctrl + F** - Send: **Alt + S** or **Ctrl + Enter** - Delete: **Delete** \| Archive: **Backspace** \| Permanent: **Shift + Delete** - Search: **F3** \| Move: **Ctrl + Shift + V** \| Flag: **Ctrl + Shift + G**
